title: spermacoce reflexa
intro: Spermacoce reflexa, also known as the slender buttons or slender buttons weed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Spermacoce reflexa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Spermacoce reflexa is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
